overall.description: A character from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) walks at night holding a lantern, approaching a large Southern plantation mansion. The scene progresses from a wooden walkway across a grassy lawn to the front porch, with the character eventually reaching the front door.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway leading to plantation house

events.description: character lights the lantern, casting warm illumination on the wooden path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden walkway holding a lantern, approaching a large mansion visible in the distance

entered.detail: large two-story Southern plantation house with tall white columns and a central pediment
low stone wall running parallel to the wooden walkway on the left side
elevated wooden boardwalk with planks leading toward the mansion
tall grass and vegetation on both sides of the walkway
tall trees silhouetted against the night sky surrounding the property

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden walkway bordered by a stone wall on the left and grass on both sides, approaching a large Southern plantation mansion visible in the distance against the dark night sky. The lantern casts a warm glow on the wooden planks as the character moves forward.

events.description: ground surface transitions from wooden walkway to dirt path as the character steps off the boardwalk onto the lawn

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk across the lawn toward the mansion, passing a tiered fountain on the right side

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain visible on the right side of the path
dirt trail leading across the lawn toward the mansion entrance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the wooden walkway onto a dirt path across the lawn, passing a tiered fountain on the right side while the plantation mansion grows larger in the center of the frame. The stone wall and wooden walkway fall behind as the character approaches the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered front porch of plantation house

events.description: character ascends wooden steps onto the covered front porch of the mansion, passing between large columns

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden steps to the porch and walking toward the front door, lantern held out to illuminate the entrance

entered.detail: wooden steps leading up to the front porch of the mansion
tall white columns supporting the porch roof on either side of the entrance
double front doors of the mansion with a transom window above

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wooden steps onto the covered front porch, passing between large columns as they approach the illuminated front door of the plantation mansion. The dirt path and fountain fall away behind as the character reaches the entrance, with the mansion's facade now filling the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded garden path toward the imposing entrance of a Southern plantation mansion under a dark night sky. It begins with the character walking along a wooden walkway, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow on the planks and a stone wall borders the path. As the character moves forward, the wooden walkway gives way to a dirt path across a grassy lawn, passing a tiered fountain while the mansion grows larger in the center of the frame. The scene then shifts as the character ascends wooden steps onto a covered front porch, moving between large columns as the lawn and fountain fall away behind. Finally, the camera reaches the illuminated front door, with the mansion's grand facade filling the entire view.
